# Appendix: Models with Many Factors {many-factors}

```{r many-factors-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/many-factors-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/many-factors/"
)
```

```{r child-many-factors, child="../lecture-content/39-many-factors.Rmd"}
```
